full_text:
Liu Xu
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Xu. Captured and then ransomed by the Yellow Turbans, later executed. Liu Xu was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Liu Xu lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
